prompt: Review a plan to add bulk dataset export API with security and safety gaps

assertions.text: Identifies SQL injection risk from interpolating tableName into SELECT * FROM {tableName}
Flags missing authentication/authorization (user must own the project)
Identifies missing limits (row count, dataset count, or memory/size constraints)
Flags GET with query string as problematic for many IDs (URL length limits, should use POST)
Mentions error handling for non-existent or inaccessible dataset IDs
Review is structured with clear priority levels (critical vs minor) rather than a flat list
